title: Garden Mile Decorative Outdoor Doormats - 45 x 75cm - Removes Grass, Mud and Dirt - Natural Coir Bristle with PVC Backing Machine Easy - Clean Non-Slip Doormats Large (Paw Prints)
features: Specifications - This decorative door mat measures in at approximately 45 x 75cm and features a low profile design to prevent sticking under doors when in operation.

Materials - Our decorative long lasting doormats are built to last, carefully crafted from 100% natural, weather resistant coir, aswell as a high-quality PVC anti-slip backing material in order to minimise slipping and tripping hazards.
Unique, Decorative - Welcome guests into your space with this Paw Print themed doormat, designed to fit within the majority of doorways and entrances!
Versatile - Our coir doormats are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, whether for commercial or personal purposes - our doormats offer reliable performance in all weather conditions.

Easy Cleaning - This decorative door mat was built with maintenance and cleaning in mind, making them highly practical for both indoor and outdoor environments. Simply give the mat a vacuum, or a quick shake to remove any loose dirt or debris; for a deeper clean rinse with a hose and hang up to air-dry!
description: Product description Our Large outside door mats for front door are made from a hard-wearing durable natural coir which helps to remove mud and dirt from shoes. Not only are these large door mat indoor sleek and stylish they also make for practical door matts indoor to keep dirt out of your home. These door mats indoor heavy duty are built with a slip resistant PVC backing which is great for using at your front of back door making sure it will stay put even when it is wet under foot. There is no need to worry about your heavy duty door mat moving out of place. No need to trail muddy or wet foot or paw prints prints through the home, with one of our indoor door mat non slip r or outdoor. Simply place one of these floor mats at any entranceway for a quick and absorbent way for your or your guests to wipe their feet. Absorbs Dirt, Mud & Water with Ease, these door door matts indoor have a non-slip backing and highly absorbent cotton fibre to trap dirt and moisture.Our outdoor door mat comes in a variety of different styles and colourways to suit everyone's décor needs. Choose from Ducks in boots, Hedgehog Spike, Highland Cow, Owls, a pheasant, peek-a-boo cat and pig and wellies. Specifications: Our outdoor mats for back door measure at 75 x 45cm approx. Suitable for indoor or outdoor use, these coir mats will allow you to bring style and practicality to any entrance way. The non slip door mats indoor are all easy clean just simply brush when dry. Safety Warning Avoid using on smooth surfaces to prevent slipping. Keep away from open flames. May cause allergic reactions in some users.
